label: Post-simplification: sender-stress removed, viewer-only ABR triggers
notes: Best session across all metrics: highest FULL %, zero false degrades, smoothest playout.
Sender-stress removed as degrade trigger; only viewer-validated signals (jitter, loss, decode, playout drift, BWE) and genuine encoder-stall remain.
FULL held 1600x900 for 212s straight with no resolution drift (previous baseline drifted to 1200x675).
fullRecoveryHoldMs reduced from 20000 to 8000; stream recovered FLOW→FULL in ~24s.
Encoder-pressure telemetry kept for diagnostics (8 events, 35-50fps dips during gaming), correctly ignored by ABR.
Playout drift events (slowdowns+speedups) at 3.1% total — best of any session, down from baseline 6.2% and stress-v1 30.3%.
Remaining opportunities: start at FULL to skip 24s ramp, add FULL-lite tier (1600x900 maintain-framerate ~10Mbps), optimize native mainToRendererMs.
